item.title: Unipro Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 34.68 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending a remarkable winning streak to 21 sessions, Unipro Technologies Ltd surged to a fresh all-time high of Rs 34.68 on 09 Apr 2026, outpacing the Sensex which declined 0.77% on the same day. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: From 17-Day Rally to Record Close: Integrated Proteins Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs 81.86
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil sector, reached a new all-time high price of Rs.81.86 on 9 April 2026, marking a significant milestone in its market journey. This peak reflects a remarkable rally over recent months, underscoring the company’s strong performance amid a bullish technical trend. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Surges 10.0% to Day's High of Rs 33.14 — Outperforms Sector by 8.81 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.91% on 9 Apr 2026, Ola Electric Mobility Ltd surged 10.04%, touching an intraday high of Rs 33.14. This 8.81-percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Surges 4.46% to Day's High of Rs 4056 — Outperforms Sector by 2.9 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.91% on 9 Apr 2026, Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd (HAL) defied the broader market weakness with a robust 4.46% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 4056. This 2.9 percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Ambuja Cements Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 Apr 2026
item.description: Ambuja Cements Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 432.45, reflecting a 3.18% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly bearish market environment. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Venus Pipes & Tubes Ltd Surges 7.18% to Day's High of Rs 1199 — Outperforms Sector by 5.27 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.83% on 9 Apr 2026, Venus Pipes & Tubes Ltd surged 7.18%, touching an intraday high of Rs 1199. This 5.27 percentage-point outperformance over its Iron & Steel Products sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Hindalco Industries Ltd Surges 3.58% to Day's High of Rs 990 — Outperforms Sector by 0.64 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.83% on 9 Apr 2026, while Hindalco Industries Ltd advanced 3.58%, marking a notable outperformance of 4.41 percentage points. This strong intraday gain, reaching a high of Rs 990, stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd is Rated Sell
item.description: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd is rated Sell by MarketsMOJO. This rating was last updated on 19 Jan 2026, reflecting a shift from the previous 'Hold' status.
